infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: DIGIX needs your location for attendance check-in and field tracking.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: DIGIX tracks your location during work hours for dispatching and route logging.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: DIGIX needs camera access to capture installation photos and scan QR codes.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: DIGIX tracks your location during work hours.
